inputs.label: Cost of Attendance
inputs.businessContext: Total yearly cost of attendance including tuition, fees, room, and board.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total yearly cost of attendance including tuition, fees, room, and board.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrenim ücreti, harçlar, oda ve yemek dahil yıllık toplam katılım maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Gesamtkosten des Studiums einschließlich Studiengebühren, Gebühren, Unterkunft und Verpflegung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total annuel de la scolarité incluant les frais de scolarité, les frais annexes, le logement et les repas.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total anual de asistencia que incluye matrícula, cuotas, alojamiento y comida.

inputs.label: Merit Aid Cap (%)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum percentage of cost of attendance that can be covered by merit aid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum percentage of cost of attendance that can be covered by merit aid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katılım maliyetinin başarı bursu ile karşılanabilecek maksimum yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Prozentsatz der Studienkosten, der durch Leistungsstipendien abgedeckt werden kann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage maximum du coût de la scolarité pouvant être couvert par l'aide au mérite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje máximo del costo de asistencia que puede cubrir la ayuda por mérito.

inputs.label: Other Financial Aid
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of other scholarships, grants, or financial aid already awarded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of other scholarships, grants, or financial aid already awarded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Halihazırda verilmiş diğer burs, hibe veya mali yardımların toplam tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetrag anderer bereits bewilligter Stipendien, Zuschüsse oder finanzieller Unterstützung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant total des autres bourses, subventions ou aides financières déjà attribuées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto total de otras becas, subvenciones o ayudas financieras ya otorgadas.

inputs.label: Expected Family Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Expected family contribution as determined by financial need analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected family contribution as determined by financial need analysis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mali ihtiyaç analizine göre belirlenen beklenen aile katkısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Familienbeitrag, ermittelt durch die Bedarfsanalyse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Contribution familiale attendue déterminée par l'analyse des besoins financiers.
businessContext_i18n.es: Contribución familiar esperada según el análisis de necesidad financiera.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
